summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DOV is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $204.19. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $233.59 and a significant trendline confluence around $218.44 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
